name: we-cfm-orchestrator
description: WalkerEnterprise CFM Kalshi 15m Deep Dive Optimization — Divergence detection + real-time momentum + crash protection
author: WalkerEnterprise

scripts.cloud:precheck: node -e "const g=require('./src/cloud/google-cloud-bridge'); g.probeCloudSql({force:true}).then(r=>{console.log('[cloud-precheck]', JSON.stringify({configured:r.configured, success:r.success, cached:!!r.cached, state:r.instanceState||null, dbExists:r.databaseExists ?? null, error:r.error||null}, null, 2)); if(process.env.WECRYPTO_REQUIRE_CLOUD_READY==='1' && (!r.configured || !r.success)){process.exit(1);} }).catch(err=>{console.error('[cloud-precheck] fatal', err?.message||err); process.exit(1);});"
scripts.cloud:ensure-db: node -e "const g=require('./src/cloud/google-cloud-bridge'); g.ensureCloudSqlDatabase({force:true}).then(r=>{console.log('[cloud-ensure-db]', JSON.stringify(r,null,2)); if(!r.success){process.exit(1);} }).catch(err=>{console.error('[cloud-ensure-db] fatal', err?.message||err); process.exit(1);});"
scripts.preflight:release: npm run security:scan-secrets && npm run cloud:ensure-db && npm run cloud:precheck && npm run firebase:precheck
scripts.build:release: npm run preflight:release && node scripts/build-electron-safe.js win
scripts.build:portable:release: npm run preflight:release && node scripts/build-electron-safe.js portable
scripts.build:installer:release: npm run preflight:release && node scripts/build-electron-safe.js nsis
